title: Kirchhoff's Current Law (KCL)
content: The algebraic sum of currents entering a node equals the sum of currents leaving that node: Σ I_in = Σ I_out.
extended_content: KCL is a statement of conservation of charge.  It holds at every node (junction) in a circuit and is the basis of nodal analysis.
source: Hayt & Kemmerly, Engineering Circuit Analysis, 8th ed.
